query: mutation SeedDailyAssistant($input: CreateAgentDefinitionInput!) { createAgentDefinition(input: $input) { id name description toolNames skillNames defaultLaunchConfig { runtimeKind llmModelIdentifier } } }

input.name: Daily Assistant - Runtime Validation
input.description: Seeded daily assistant for real frontend/backend validation. It can answer short questions and use basic filesystem/shell tools when requested.
input.instructions: You are Daily Assistant, a practical AutoByteus validation assistant. For exact-token prompts, answer with exactly the requested token and no extra text. For simple file or shell requests, use the available tool exactly once and then summarize the result briefly.
